name: PHP External Variable Modification
description: A PHP application does not properly protect against modification of variables from external sources such as query parameters or cookies. When register_globals is enabled or input is not validated, attackers can overwrite internal variables, enabling vulnerabilities like remote file inclusion.
detection_pattern: An INGRESS[http_parameter] node in a PHP context provides externally-controlled input that directly overwrites a STORAGE[internal_variable] node used in application logic without a CONTROL[input_validation] or STRUCTURAL[register_globals_disabled] mediator preventing external variable injection.
